startups.name: Mercury
startups.description: Business banking and financial workflows for startups.
sourceNotes: Known for banking, cards, transfers, treasury-style cash visibility, and startup-focused financial operations.
Good fork direction: keep the workflow pattern, narrow the customer segment, and avoid needing to become a bank.

startups.name: Ramp
startups.description: Corporate cards, spend management, bill pay, procurement, and finance automation.
sourceNotes: Known for combining cards, expense controls, approvals, vendor payments, and finance automation.
Good fork direction: pick a vertical with repeated spend controls and compliance workflows.
